tasks.description: Provision all infrastructure components including PostgreSQL, Redis/Valkey, Kafka, MongoDB, RabbitMQ, and SeaweedFS using Kubernetes operators and CRDs
tasks.details:
Deploy infrastructure resources using CRDs:

1. Create namespaces: databases, kafka, messaging, storage

2. PostgreSQL (CloudNative-PG):
```yaml
apiVersion: postgresql.cnpg.io/v1
kind: Cluster
metadata:
  name: alerthub-postgres
  namespace: databases
spec:
  instances: 1
  storage:
    size: 10Gi
  bootstrap:
    initdb:
      database: alerthub
      owner: alerthub_user
```

3. Redis/Valkey, Kafka (Strimzi), MongoDB (Percona), RabbitMQ, and SeaweedFS CRDs as specified in PRD

4. Create ConfigMaps and Secrets for connection strings
5. Apply Network Policies for service isolation
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Verify all pods reach Running state
2. Test connectivity to each service from a debug pod
3. Validate PostgreSQL accepts connections
4. Confirm Redis responds to PING
5. Verify Kafka topic creation works
6. Test MongoDB connection
tasks.title: Setup Infrastructure (Bolt - Kubernetes)

tasks.description: Build the high-performance notification routing service with rate limiting, deduplication, and Kafka integration
tasks.details: Create Rust/Axum 0.7 service with endpoints: POST /api/v1/notifications, batch endpoint, GET status, WebSocket for real-time, health checks, and Prometheus metrics. Implement rate limiting via Redis, priority queues, deduplication with TTL, and dead letter queue.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests, integration tests with testcontainers, load test for 10k notifications/minute
tasks.title: Notification Router Service (Rex - Rust/Axum)

tasks.description: Build Go gRPC service with grpc-gateway for tenant, user, rule management and analytics
tasks.details: Implement TenantService, UserService, RuleService, AnalyticsService with JWT auth, RBAC (owner/admin/member/viewer), notification rules engine, and audit logging.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for rule engine, integration tests for gRPC, verify RBAC restrictions
tasks.title: Admin API Service (Grizz - Go/gRPC)

tasks.description: Build Bun/Elysia service with Effect for channel delivery (Slack, Discord, email, push, webhooks)
tasks.details: Implement Effect Services for each channel with retry logic, Effect Schema validation, Kafka/RabbitMQ consumers, rate limiting via Effect Semaphore, OAuth2 token refresh, and webhook signature verification.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests with Effect TestContext, integration tests with mock HTTP servers, E2E Kafka flow test
tasks.title: Integration Service (Nova - Bun/Elysia)

tasks.description: Create PostgreSQL migrations for tenants, users, notifications, rules, and audit logs
tasks.details: SQL migrations for all tables with proper indexes, foreign keys, and JSONB columns using sqlx migrations.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify migrations apply cleanly, test rollback, validate constraints
tasks.title: Database Schema Migrations (Rex - Rust/Axum)

tasks.description: Set up MongoDB collections with Drizzle ORM for integrations and templates
tasks.details: Create integrations, templates, and delivery_logs collections with indexes and TTL for old logs.
tasks.testStrategy: Test CRUD operations, verify indexes, test TTL cleanup
tasks.title: MongoDB Schema Setup (Nova - Bun/Elysia)

tasks.description: Create Kafka topics and message schemas for notification events
tasks.details: KafkaTopic CRDs for notifications, delivery-events, notifications-dlq with JSON schemas for message contracts.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify topics created, test message production/consumption
tasks.title: Kafka Topics and Schemas (Bolt - Kubernetes)

tasks.description: Build Next.js 15 web console with dashboard, notification history, and real-time WebSocket feed
tasks.details: Next.js 15 App Router with React 19, shadcn/ui, TailwindCSS 4, Effect for validation and data fetching, TanStack Query, WebSocket Stream.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests, E2E with Playwright, visual regression tests
tasks.title: Web Console Dashboard (Blaze - React/Next.js)

tasks.description: Build integration wizard with OAuth flows and drag-and-drop rule builder
tasks.details: Integration management page, OAuth flow handling, rule builder with @dnd-kit, Effect Schema form validation, analytics charts with recharts.
tasks.testStrategy: Test wizard navigation, OAuth flow, drag-drop functionality
tasks.title: Web Console Integrations & Rules (Blaze - React/Next.js)

tasks.description: Build Expo mobile app with push notifications, home feed, and biometric auth
tasks.details: Expo SDK 50+, expo-notifications, expo-local-authentication, expo-router, NativeWind, TanStack Query, offline caching.
tasks.testStrategy: Test push registration, biometric auth, deep linking
tasks.title: Mobile App Core (Tap - Expo)

tasks.description: Complete mobile app with integrations view, settings, and profile screens
tasks.details: Settings persistence, notification preferences, dark mode, profile management, NativeWind styling.
tasks.testStrategy: Test settings persistence, preference sync, logout flow
tasks.title: Mobile App Settings & Profile (Tap - Expo)

tasks.description: Build Electron app with system tray, native notifications, and main window
tasks.details: Electron 28+, system tray with context menu, native notifications, window management, IPC, auto-start, keyboard shortcuts.
tasks.testStrategy: Test tray on all platforms, native notifications, IPC

tasks.description: Complete desktop client with settings window, mini popup, and cross-platform builds
tasks.details: Settings window with electron-store, mini notification popup, WebSocket connection, cross-platform build config.

tasks.description: Create K8s deployments, services, ConfigMaps, HPA for all services
tasks.details: Deployments with health probes, resource limits, HPA, ConfigMaps, Secrets, Network Policies, Ingress.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify deployments running, test HPA scaling, network policies

tasks.description: Deploy Prometheus, Grafana dashboards, and configure structured JSON logging
tasks.details: ServiceMonitors for Prometheus, Grafana dashboard ConfigMaps, structured JSON logging with trace IDs, alert rules.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify metrics scraping, dashboard queries, log format validation
tasks.title: Observability Stack (Bolt - Kubernetes)
